summary: Iteration 60 - AI Commentary Cache TTL Bug Fix Verification COMPLETE. All reported bugs have been FIXED: 1) AI Commentary now returns fresh data with 12 key moments covering overs 1.3 to 12.2 (was stuck at 4 overs), 2) Commentary cache has 3-min TTL for live matches (was infinite), 3) Force refresh parameter bypasses cache, 4) Scorecard cache TTL reduced to 45s, 5) Polling interval reduced to 30s. All celebration animations working.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG 1 FIX VERIFIED: matches.py Lines 1058-1080 - AI commentary cache now has 3-min TTL for live matches, checks generated_at timestamp and regenerates if stale
BUG 2 FIX VERIFIED: api_cache.py Line 24 - TTL_SCORECARD = 45 (was 60s, now matches polling interval)
BUG 3 FIX VERIFIED: matches.py Line 1054 - force=true parameter bypasses cache and regenerates commentary
BUG 4 FIX VERIFIED: MatchDetailPage.jsx Lines 166-177 - Polling interval is 30 seconds for live/open matches
BUG 5 FIX VERIFIED: MatchDetailPage.jsx Lines 446-467 - Live Update Indicator shows 'Updated Xs ago | Poll #N | Refresh' button
CELEBRATION FIX VERIFIED: CelebrationOverlay.jsx - SIX/FOUR/WICKET/WINNER animations all trigger correctly from demo buttons
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 60 verified all AI Commentary cache TTL bug fixes. Key findings: 1) AI commentary endpoint returns 12 key moments covering overs 1.3 to 12.2 (previously stuck at 4 overs due to infinite cache), 2) Commentary cache TTL is 3 minutes for live matches, 3) force=true parameter regenerates commentary, 4) Scorecard cache TTL is 45s, 5) Frontend polling is 30s. Live match ID: 9c53d4ca-10c2-4e18-a723-77d4bd205640 (PBKS vs GT). All celebration overlays (SIX/FOUR/WICKET/WINNER) working with canvas particle effects. Live Update Indicator shows 'Updated Xs ago | Poll #N | Refresh' button.

ai_commentary_cache_ttl.api_test: PASSED - GET /api/matches/{id}/ai-commentary returns 12 key moments covering overs 1.3 to 12.2
ai_commentary_cache_ttl.cache_ttl: PASSED - 3-minute TTL for live matches (was infinite before fix)
ai_commentary_cache_ttl.force_refresh: PASSED - force=true parameter bypasses cache and returns cached=false

scorecard_cache_ttl.data_freshness: PASSED - Scorecard shows current match state

live_update_indicator.ui_test: PASSED - Shows 'Updated Xs ago | Poll #N | Refresh' button
live_update_indicator.refresh_button: PASSED - Force refresh button triggers fetchLiveData(true)

celebration_overlays.six_animation: PASSED - Golden 'MAXIMUM!' overlay with fire particles
celebration_overlays.wicket_animation: PASSED - Red 'WICKET!' overlay with stump debris
celebration_overlays.demo_buttons: PASSED - All 4 demo buttons (SIX/FOUR/WICKET/WINNER) visible and clickable

polling_interval.config: PASSED - 30-second polling for live/open matches (was 45s before fix)

live_tab_timeline.key_moments: PASSED - 12 key moments displayed in Timeline tab
live_tab_timeline.over_coverage: PASSED - Moments cover overs 1.3 to 12.2 (not stuck at 4 overs)

match_pulse.ui_test: PASSED - Match Pulse shows 'Gill glides, Jansen strikes—Mullanpur crackles'

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: AI commentary_cache had NO TTL - once generated at over 4, it was cached forever and never regenerated even as match progressed to 12+ overs. Scorecard cache was 60s while polling was 45s causing timing mismatches.
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: 1) Added 3-minute TTL check in get_ai_commentary endpoint (Lines 1058-1080 in matches.py), 2) Reduced TTL_SCORECARD from 60s to 45s in api_cache.py, 3) Reduced polling from 45s to 30s in MatchDetailPage.jsx, 4) Added force=true parameter to bypass cache
rca_of_the_issue.verification: API now returns 12 key moments covering overs 1.3 to 12.2. Force refresh works. Live Update Indicator shows poll count and refresh button.
